message:
deps: bump thiserror 2.0.11 -> 2.0.18

Patch bump within 2.x. Bugfix-only releases (refined transparent-variant
handling, better hygiene in generated code). Existing `#[derive(Error)]`
sites compile unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ serde_json = { version = "1.0.149", features = ["preserve_order"] }
 sha2 = "0.11.0"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
 tempfile = "3.27.0"
-thiserror = "2.0.11"
+thiserror = "2.0.18"
 toml = "0.8"
 tracing = "0.1.41"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3.19"
